pageName: Unlimited Memory for TiDB-Powered OpenClaw Agents

meta.title: Unlimited Memory for TiDB-Powered OpenClaw Agents
meta.description: Persistent memory infrastructure for OpenClaw agents with hybrid search and cross-agent recall. TiDB enables scalable hidden storage.

props.headline: Unlimited memory for OpenClaw
props.subheadline: Your agents forget everything between sessions. mem9 fixes that. Persistent memory infrastructure with hybrid search, shared spaces, and cross-agent recall from first write to forever.

props.title: Never forget again
props.subtitle: Cloud-persistent memory that survives resets, restarts, and machine switches.

items.title: Cloud-persistent memory
items.description: Your agent memory lives in durable cloud storage, not fragile local files.

items.title: Securely backed up
items.description: Enterprise-grade encryption and access controls protect your agent data.

items.title: Seamless onboarding
items.description: Start with one instruction, then bring over existing memory without breaking your flow.

props.title: Persistent memory, zero plumbing
props.subtitle: Stop duct-taping databases and sync scripts together. mem9 gives your agents one memory layer.

items.title: Instant persistent storage
items.description: Spin up a durable memory backend in seconds. No schema design, no control plane, no ops. Your agent writes and mem9 persists.

items.title: Hybrid search, zero config
items.description: Keyword search works out of the box. Add embeddings and mem9 automatically upgrades to vector plus keyword with no re-indexing.

items.title: Memory that follows your agent
items.description: Close the tab. Restart the machine. Switch devices. Your agent's memory persists in the cloud and follows everywhere.

items.title: Open source, self-hostable
items.description: Apache-2.0 Go server, TypeScript plugins, and bash hooks. Run on our cloud or bring it home.

props.title: One memory layer. Every agent.
props.subtitle: Agents shouldn't lose context when they switch tools. mem9 gives every agent a shared, persistent memory.

items.title: OpenClaw
items.description: Give your OpenClaw agents memory that never expires. Recall past conversations, reuse learned knowledge, and stay consistent.

items.title: Your Memory App
items.description: Visualize, manage, analyze, import, and export your memories from the official mem9.ai interface.

props.title: Enterprise-grade protection for your agent memory
props.subtitle: mem9 is designed to give users persistent cloud memory with clear operational boundaries and strong security foundations.

items.title: Encryption in transit and at rest
items.description: Memory data is protected while moving across the network and while stored in durable cloud infrastructure.

items.title: Access controls
items.description: Production access is controlled and limited to systems and operators that need it.

items.title: Auditability and visibility
items.description: Key actions are observable so operations can be tracked and reviewed for compliance.

items.title: Isolated data boundaries
items.description: Memory processing is scoped to clear service boundaries to reduce unnecessary exposure.

items.a: mem9 is built on enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure with encryption in transit and at rest, access controls, auditability, and clear operational boundaries. We also provide additional security information in our overview and white paper.

items.q: How do I get started with OpenClaw?
items.a: Read the installation guide at mem9.ai/SKILL.md and follow the instructions to install and configure mem9 for OpenClaw. Onboarding takes minutes.
Yes. mem9 is open source under Apache-2.0 with a Go server, TypeScript plugins, and bash hooks. You can run it on our cloud or bring it home.

items.q: What happens to my agent memory?
items.a: Your agent memory persists in durable cloud storage with clear data handling boundaries. Memory data is stored to help agents preserve context across sessions, devices, and workflows.

props.title: Ready to give your OpenClaw agents unlimited memory?
props.subtitle: Start in minutes with zero configuration required.
